title: python3.12 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.12.12-1.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.12.12-1]
- Update to 3.12.12
Resolves: RHEL-125856
